description: Pair-level OLS diagnostic controlling for marginal quality and per-case variance before estimating the same-FM/Table-1 same-group association with pairwise Pearson correlation.
same_group_rule: same FM plus DINOv2-B/S, matching the Table-1 grouping

bootstrap.unit: test case / slice; slice-derived tasks are case-bootstrap diagnostics

quality_control_model.formula: pearson_r ~ same_group + pair_mean_dice + abs_mean_dice_diff + avg_case_variance + abs_case_variance_diff
